articles.title: DOJ Opposes Law Firm Tasked With FTX Investigation for Conflict of Interest
articles.description: The US Department of Justice has opposed FTX hiring Sullivan & Cromwell, the law firm currently tasked with the exchange's investigation, citing potential conflicts of interest. In a recent legal filing, the US Trustee said it is objecting to the FTX decision due to two "overarching" reasons.
